title: Grace and Mortgage: The Language of Faith and the Debt of the World
author: Peter Selby
targetAudience: Readers interested in the intersection of faith and economic issues
relatedBooks: The Divine Economy by Peter Selby
Debt: The First 5,000 Years by David Graeber
Theology of the Debt by David M. Kelsey
keyInsights: Explores the relationship between faith and financial obligations
Discusses the moral implications of debt
Encourages a rethinking of economic systems through a spiritual lens
